before: Waves alternate between crest and trough.
Breathing alternates between inhalation and exhalation.
Life alternates between expansion and contraction.
From a narrow perspective, positive and negative appear opposed.
From a wider perspective, they are phases of one oscillation.
Thus polarity is not necessarily ultimate separation. It may be phase distinction within deeper unity.
current: \FHQCMFigurePlaceholder{F048 — Love as Harmonic Coherence}{Dissonant waves become coherent through listening, repair, relation, and love.}{F048-love-as-harmonic-coherence}
after: The torus symbolizes circulation, return, and transformation.
The final unity is not identical to the first unity because it now contains conscious relationship.
surroundingText: Waves alternate between crest and trough. Breathing alternates between inhalation and exhalation. Life alternates between expansion and contraction. From a narrow perspective, positive and negative appear opposed. From a wider perspective, they are phases of one oscillation. Thus polarity is not necessarily ultimate separation. It may be phase distinction within deeper unity. F048 — Love as Harmonic CoherenceDissonant waves become coherent through listening, repair, relation, and love.F048-love-as-harmonic-coherence Toroidal Recursion The torus symbolizes circulation, return, and transformation. The basic symbolic movement is: [ 1 rightarrow Many rightarrow 1' ] The final unity is not identical to the first unity because it now contains conscious relationship.
